name: Generate Image
description: Generate a PNG image from HTML content or a public URL using headless Chromium. Supports custom dimensions, retina quality, full-page screenshots, cookie consent handling, and dynamic parameters.

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL of the webpage to capture as image

fields.name: html_content
fields.description: HTML content to render as image. Either url or html_content must be provided.

fields.name: css_content
fields.description: Optional CSS to apply to the HTML

fields.name: deviceScaleFactor
fields.description: Device pixel ratio (1-3). Use 2 for retina quality.

fields.name: full_page
fields.description: Capture full scrollable page (URL mode only)

fields.name: wait_for_timeout
fields.description: Extra delay in ms after page load

fields.name: cookie_accept_text
fields.description: Text of cookie consent button to click before capturing
